name: Recon- DC with Acu - High Level

content.query:
SELECT 
factGL.[Module]
,factGL.[FinPeriodID]
,factGL.[RDC_CreditAmount]
,factGL.[RDC_DebitAmount]
,factGL.[RDC_BalanceAmount]
,factGL.[RDC_LineCount]
,glSumm.CreditAmount as ACU_CreditAmount
,glSumm.DebitAmount as ACU_DebitAmount
,(glSumm.DebitAmount - glSumm.CreditAmount)  as ACU_BalanceAmount
,glSumm.LineCount as ACU_LineCount
,factGL.RDC_BalanceAmount - (glSumm.DebitAmount - glSumm.CreditAmount) as Diff_BalanceAmount
,factGL.RDC_LineCount - glSumm.LineCount AS Diff_LineCount
,factGL.RDC_DebitAmount - glSumm.DebitAmount AS Diff_DebitAmount
FROM
 (
    select 
        [Module], 
        FinPeriodID, 
        sum(CreditAmount) as RDC_CreditAmount, 
        sum(DebitAmount) as RDC_DebitAmount, 
        sum(BalanceAmount) as RDC_BalanceAmount,
        count(1) as RDC_LineCount
    from
        [EDW].[FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION] 
    where
        Posted = 'True'
    group by
        [Module], 
        FinPeriodID
 ) factGL
 ,[ODS].[ERP_GLSUMM_BY_MODULE_PERIOD] glSumm
 WHERE 
 REPLACE(factGL.FinPeriodID,'-','') = glSumm.PeriodID
 AND factGL.[Module] = glSumm.[Module]
AND factGL.RDC_LineCount != glSumm.LineCount
--and factGL.FinPeriodID not in ('08-2022', '09-2022')
ORDER BY
factGL.[Module]
,factGL.[FinPeriodID]



--select GL_LINE_KEY from EDW.FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION where FinPeriodID = '08-2021' and Module = 'AR'
